Trusted by fast-moving product, ops, and growth teams.

Triggers

Start workflows from form submits, payments, events, or API calls.

Approvals

Route tasks to the right people with clear status and audit trails.

Alerts

Notify teams instantly when something breaks or needs attention.

Reports

Track throughput, bottlenecks, and SLA health in one dashboard.

Everything you need to automate operations

Fast setup

Launch workflows in minutes with simple templates and flexible rules.

Reliable control

Add checkpoints, alerts, and fallbacks so nothing slips through.
